Speakers.Speaker: Returning from the Abyss of Time

Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You can use the stairs in the Desert of Doors to return to the dorm. Doing so will fully restore your HP and SP.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 0 1 2}The layout of the Abyss of Time will change{f 0 1 27} each time you enter it. {f 0 1 2}Treasure chests you have already found can be rediscovered{f 0 1 27} as well, so returning could be a good idea if you find yourself stuck.[n]{f 1 1}
